name: Banshee
author: Nikro

placementContext.reason: Banshee's incredible consistency-based difficulty, combined with its high-speed wave and ship sections, has proven to be a bridge too far for many, but the recent 86% run shows it is nearing completion.

description: A high-intensity extreme demon that emphasizes fast-paced mechanics and precision, featuring a dark and mysterious aesthetic that complements its extreme difficulty curve.
